'''√n-zh-p''' ('''nazhapa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zoot|zoot]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-zh-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zoot|zoot]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √n-zh-p
|-
! Lemma
| nazhapa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nazhapithi|nazhapithi]] || [[word:nazhapiji|nazhapiji]] || [[word:nazhapishi|nazhapishi]] || [[word:nazhapi|nazhapi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nazhaputhuth|nazhaputhuth]] || [[word:nazhapujuj|nazhapujuj]] || [[word:nazhapushush|nazhapushush]] || [[word:nazhap|nazhap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nazhaputhu|nazhaputhu]] || [[word:nazhapuju|nazhapuju]] || [[word:nazhapushu|nazhapushu]] || [[word:nazhapu|nazhapu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nazhapufuth|nazhapufuth]] || [[word:nazhapufuj|nazhapufuj]] || [[word:nazhapufush|nazhapufush]] || [[word:nazhapuf|nazhapuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nazhapethe|nazhapethe]] || [[word:nazhapeje|nazhapeje]] || [[word:nazhapeshe|nazhapeshe]] || [[word:nazhape|nazhape]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nazhapothoth|nazhapothoth]] || [[word:nazhapojoj|nazhapojoj]] || [[word:nazhaposhosh|nazhaposhosh]] || [[word:nazhap|nazhap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nazhapotho|nazhapotho]] || [[word:nazhapojo|nazhapojo]] || [[word:nazhaposho|nazhaposho]] || [[word:nazhapo|nazhapo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nazhapofoth|nazhapofoth]] || [[word:nazhapofoj|nazhapofoj]] || [[word:nazhapofosh|nazhapofosh]] || [[word:nazhapof|nazhapof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:nazhapïf|nazhapïf]] || [[word:nazhapïf|nazhapïf]] || [[word:nazhapïf|nazhapïf]] || [[word:nazhapïf|nazhapïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:nazhapïfïf|nazhapïfïf]] || [[word:nazhapïfïf|nazhapïfïf]] || [[word:nazhapïfïf|nazhapïfïf]] || [[word:nazhapïfïf|nazhapïfïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:nazhapïf|nazhapïf]] || [[word:nazhapïf|nazhapïf]] || [[word:nazhapïf|nazhapïf]] || [[word:nazhapïf|nazhapïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:nazhapïf|nazhapïf]] || [[word:nazhapïf|nazhapïf]] || [[word:nazhapïf|nazhapïf]] || [[word:nazhapïf|nazhapïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nazhapæthæ|nazhapæthæ]] || [[word:nazhapæjæ|nazhapæjæ]] || [[word:nazhapæshæ|nazhapæshæ]] || [[word:nazhapæ|nazhapæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nazhapathath|nazhapathath]] || [[word:nazhapajaj|nazhapajaj]] || [[word:nazhapashash|nazhapashash]] || [[word:nazhap|nazhap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nazhapatha|nazhapatha]] || [[word:nazhapaja|nazhapaja]] || [[word:nazhapasha|nazhapasha]] || [[word:nazhapa|nazhapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nazhapafath|nazhapafath]] || [[word:nazhapafaj|nazhapafaj]] || [[word:nazhapafash|nazhapafash]] || [[word:nazhapaf|nazhapaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:nazhapasha|nazhapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gonazhapasha|gonazhapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokinazhapasha|gokinazhapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:nazhapnüsha|nazhapnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gonazhapnknüsha|gonazhapnknüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokinazhapnüsha|gokinazhapnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nazhapshësha|nazhapshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonazhapnkshësha|gonazhapnkshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinazhapshësha|gokinazhapshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nazhaprosha|nazhaprosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonazhapnkrosha|gonazhapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinazhaprosha|gokinazhaprosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nazhapmusha|nazhapmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gonazhapnkmusha|gonazhapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinazhapmusha|gokinazhapmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:nazhapsherasha|nazhapsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gonazhapnksherasha|gonazhapnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokinazhapsherasha|gokinazhapsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:nazhapngasha|nazhapngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gonazhapnkngasha|gonazhapnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokinazhapngasha|gokinazhapngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nazhapyasha|nazhapyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gonazhapnkyasha|gonazhapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokinazhapyasha|gokinazhapyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:nazhapyamasha|nazhapyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gonazhapnkyamasha|gonazhapnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokinazhapyamasha|gokinazhapyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:nazhapnüshësha|nazhapnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonazhapnknüshësha|gonazhapnknüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinazhapnüshësha|gokinazhapnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:nazhapnürosha|nazhapnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonazhapnknürosha|gonazhapnknürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinazhapnürosha|gokinazhapnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nazhapnümusha|nazhapnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonazhapnknümusha|gonazhapnknümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinazhapnümusha|gokinazhapnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:nazhapshënüsha|nazhapshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonazhapnkshënüsha|gonazhapnkshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinazhapshënüsha|gokinazhapshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:nazhapshërosha|nazhapshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonazhapnkshërosha|gonazhapnkshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinazhapshërosha|gokinazhapshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nazhapshëmusha|nazhapshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonazhapnkshëmusha|gonazhapnkshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinazhapshëmusha|gokinazhapshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:nazhapronüsha|nazhapronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonazhapnkronüsha|gonazhapnkronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinazhapronüsha|gokinazhapronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:nazhaproshësha|nazhaproshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonazhapnkroshësha|gonazhapnkroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinazhaproshësha|gokinazhaproshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nazhapromusha|nazhapromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonazhapnkromusha|gonazhapnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinazhapromusha|gokinazhapromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:nazhapmunüsha|nazhapmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonazhapnkmunüsha|gonazhapnkmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinazhapmunüsha|gokinazhapmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:nazhapmushësha|nazhapmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonazhapnkmushësha|gonazhapnkmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinazhapmushësha|gokinazhapmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:nazhapmurosha|nazhapmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonazhapnkmurosha|gonazhapnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinazhapmurosha|gokinazhapmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:nazhap|nazhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:næzhæp|næzhæp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:honazhap|honazhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:honæzhæp|honæzhæp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohonazhap|hohonazhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohonæzhæp|hohonæzhæp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nünazhap|nünazhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nünæzhæp|nünæzhæp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nününazhap|nününazhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nününæzhæp|nününæzhæp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nïnazhap|nïnazhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nïnæzhæp|nïnæzhæp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïnazhap|nïnïnazhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïnæzhæp|nïnïnæzhæp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lunazhap|lunazhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lunæzhæp|lunæzhæp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulunazhap|lulunazhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulunæzhæp|lulunæzhæp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:linazhap|linazhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:linæzhæp|linæzhæp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilinazhap|lilinazhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilinæzhæp|lilinæzhæp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:konazhap|konazhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:konæzhæp|konæzhæp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokonazhap|kokonazhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokonæzhæp|kokonæzhæp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kenazhap|kenazhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kenæzhæp|kenæzhæp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekenazhap|kekenazhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekenæzhæp|kekenæzhæp]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
